build.buildCommand: corepack enable && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen && pnpm --filter @workspace/db run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-client-react run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-zod run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/clinic-app run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
